center.name: 布魯島
center.summary: 布魯島是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联6种鸟类，包括長尾山鳩、Elegant imperial pigeon、Wakolo myzomela等6种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is native to Buru island

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in Buru, Seram, and Kai Besar

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Vagrants have also been recorded from Buru and Darwin, Australia. The elegant imperial pigeon inhabits primary forest, secondary forest, forest edge, and trees in cultivated areas

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The south Moluccan sunbird is endemic to Buru, Seram Island and the Kai Islands in the Maluku Islands of Indonesia. It is found in various habitats including mangroves, forest edge, open scrub as well as parks and gardens

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is endemic to Indonesia, where it occurs in the Moluccan Islands of Buru and Seram. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests, subtropical or tropical mangrove forests, and subtropical or tropical moist montane forests

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is endemic to Indonesia and inhabits montane forest and disturbed lowland forest on Buru
